violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Bucket sanitizer too weak in main kitchen. Dispensers in all 3 kitchens need servicing.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Detail cleaning needed. Ladder rack in walk in cooler, area around fryer, and lower storage shelving in areas need cleaning.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Locate and use test strips on a regular basis to ensure proper sanitizing concentrations are maintained at chemical dispensers.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Attachments to walls and ceilings (e.g. light fixtures, vent covers, decorations etc..) were not cleanable and/or maintained in good repair. Vent covers need cleaning in Main kitchen.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors needs cleaning in and around walk in cooler an around fryer in main kitchen.

Lighting. — --Light intensity for walk-in refrigeration was insufficient.--Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. Shields missing in multiple light fixtures in main concessions area. Shield missing from light fixture in storage area above ice machine.
